## Functions (1)

*Automate TheHive actions or ingest alerts*

### [alertFromAirtable](https://github.com/StrangeBeeCorp/integrations/blob/develop/integrations/vendors/Airtable/thehive/functions/function_Feeder_alertFromAirtable.js) `v1.0.0`
This function creates alerts from data coming from a Airtable database. It checks the alert does not already exist, then creates the alert, and completes type, source, source-ref, title, description and tags
